ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medical_terms" (
  "term_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the medical term */,
  "term_label" TEXT /* Label of the medical term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the term was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the term was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the term belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the term (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the term (e.g., ICD-10, SNOMED CT) */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the term was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the change record */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., term label change) */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the term that was changed */,
  "term_label" TEXT /* Previous label of the term */,
  "term_id_updated" TEXT /* Updated identifier of the term */,
  "term_label_updated" TEXT /* New label of the term after the update */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when this change was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_changes_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES medical_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_changes_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_changes_term_id_updated FOREIGN KEY ("term_id_updated") REFERENCES medical_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change related to this action, if applicable */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES term_changes ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_types" (
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the change type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the change type entails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the term mapped to the category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category that the term belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES term_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_category_mapping_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES medical_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the term that was revised */,
  "previous_label" TEXT /* Label of the term before the revision */,
  "new_label" TEXT /* Label of the term after the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the revision was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_revisions_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES medical_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_revisions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym entry */,
  "term_id" TEXT /* ID of the term associated with the synonym */,
  "synonym_label" TEXT /* Synonym label for the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_synonyms_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES medical_terms ("term_id")
)
